scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postinstall:
printf '#!/bin/bash
export PATH="/root/.nix-profile/bin:/nix/var/nix/profiles/default/bin:$PATH"
cd /app
exec node index.js
' > /usr/local/bin/admin.shivangiautoclinic.com 2>/dev/null && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/admin.shivangiautoclinic.com 2>/dev/null || true
